prerequisites.meta.title: Prerequisites - DevAI Day Workshop
prerequisites.meta.description: Prerequisites for the DevAI Day Workshop — everything attendees should install and set up in advance for a smooth day, with core and per-path requirements.
prerequisites.hero.title: Workshop Prerequisites
prerequisites.hero.subtitle: Please complete this setup before the workshop so we can spend the day building, not installing. Start with the core requirements, then check the extras for the paths you plan to follow.
prerequisites.core.title: Core Prerequisites (everyone)
prerequisites.core.subtitle: Required for every path — set these up first
prerequisites.core.githubAccount.html: GitHub account — created and signed in. Sign up
prerequisites.core.copilotLicense.html: GitHub Copilot license — Individual, Business, or Enterprise, activated on your account. Check plans & access
prerequisites.core.vscode.html: Visual Studio Code (latest version) installed. Download VS Code
prerequisites.core.copilotExtensions.htm: Copilot extensions for VS Code — install GitHub Copilot and GitHub Copilot Chat, then sign in with your GitHub account. Get the extension
prerequisites.core.git.html: Git installed and configured. Install Git
prerequisites.core.browser.html: A modern browser and a stable internet connection (some exercises run on github.com and in the cloud).
prerequisites.core.confirmTitle: Confirm Copilot works before the day
prerequisites.core.confirmText: Open VS Code, create a file, and check that you get inline suggestions and that Copilot Chat responds. If not, make sure you're signed in and your Copilot subscription is active.
prerequisites.access.title: Accounts & Access
prerequisites.access.subtitle: Permissions to sort out ahead of time (especially on managed/enterprise accounts)
prerequisites.access.copilotEnabled.html: Copilot enabled for your account by your organization (if you use a Business/Enterprise plan).
prerequisites.access.repositories.html: Ability to create repositories and fork public repositories under your account.
prerequisites.access.codingAgent.html: Copilot coding agent available. Availability depends on your Copilot plan/admin settings.
prerequisites.access.actions.html: GitHub Actions enabled on a repo you control, with permission to add workflows (needed for Path 5).
prerequisites.perPath.title: Per-Path Requirements
prerequisites.perPath.subtitle: Extras to install only for the paths you'll follow (in addition to the core list)
prerequisites.path1.title: Path 1 — Start Coding with AI
prerequisites.path1.description: IDE-based exercises in VS Code, ending with building a small app.
prerequisites.path1.item1.html: VS Code with GitHub Copilot + Copilot Chat, signed in (core).
prerequisites.path1.item2.html: Ability to fork the sample repo and clone it with Git.
prerequisites.path1.item3.html: For the end-to-end app: a runtime for your chosen stack — Python (Flask), Node.js (Express), or Java (Spring Boot).
prerequisites.path1.item4.html: Optional: use GitHub Codespaces instead of a local setup.
prerequisites.path2.title: Path 2 — Copilot Pro Features
prerequisites.path2.item1.html: Access to the Copilot coding agent (create repos, assign issues to Copilot).
prerequisites.path2.item2.html: Permission to configure repo rulesets / enable Copilot code review.
prerequisites.path2.item4: No local tooling strictly required beyond a browser and your GitHub account.
prerequisites.path3.title: Path 3 — Extended Capabilities
prerequisites.path3.description: CLI, SDK, Agent Skills, Sub-Agents, and Memory.
prerequisites.path3.item1.html: GitHub CLI (gh) v2.x, installed and authenticated. cli.github.com
prerequisites.path3.item2.html: A supported shell — Bash, Zsh, Fish, or PowerShell.
prerequisites.path3.item3.html: For the SDK exercise: Node.js 18+ or Python 3.9+, plus ngrok (or similar) for HTTPS tunneling.
prerequisites.path3.item4.html: VS Code + Copilot Chat with agent mode for Skills & Sub-Agents.
prerequisites.path4.title: Path 4 — Spec-Driven Development
prerequisites.path4.description: Specs first, then GitHub Spec Kit.
prerequisites.path4.item1.html: Python 3.11+ and uv installed.
prerequisites.path4.item2.html: Git and a Copilot-enabled agent (VS Code or Copilot CLI).
prerequisites.path4.item3.html: The specify CLI — installed together during the session (no need to pre-install).
prerequisites.path5.title: Path 5 — Agentic Workflows
prerequisites.path5.item2.html: A GitHub repository with Actions enabled and permission to add workflows.
prerequisites.path5.item3: A coding agent / model available to your repo (e.g., GitHub Copilot).
prerequisites.path5.item4.html: The gh-aw extension — installed together during the session.
prerequisites.verify.title: Verify Your Setup
prerequisites.verify.subtitle: Run these the day before — each should succeed without errors
prerequisites.verify.intro: Open a terminal and check the tools you'll need. Not every command applies to every path — match them to the paths you're attending.
prerequisites.verify.authWarningTitle.ht: If gh auth status shows you're not logged in
prerequisites.verify.authWarningText.htm: Run gh auth login and follow the prompts. You should end up logged in to github.com.
prerequisites.tips.title: Day-of Tips
prerequisites.tips.subtitle: Small things that prevent big delays
prerequisites.tips.signIn.html: Sign in to github.com, VS Code, and the GitHub CLI ahead of time so you're not fighting auth prompts during exercises.
prerequisites.tips.update.html: Update VS Code and the Copilot extensions to the latest version for the smoothest experience.
prerequisites.tips.network.html: On a corporate network? Confirm access to github.com, the VS Code Marketplace, and npm/PyPI, or have a backup connection ready.
prerequisites.tips.shortOnTime.html: Short on time? Just complete the Core Prerequisites — the per-path extras can be installed during the session if needed.
